_comment: Copy this file to {your-plugin-slug}.setup.json and fill in the values.
name: Your Plugin Display Name
goal: One-line description of what state this setup puts the plugin in

options._comment: WP options to set via wp option update. Key = option name, value = value.

cli_commands: _comment: WP-CLI commands to run (without 'wp' prefix). 'rewrite flush --hard' is almost always needed.
